PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?game(ABS(?runsD - ?runsP) AS ?difference) WHERE {
  ?series wdt:P31 wd:Q1363275 ; wdt:P1547 wd:Q334634 ; wdt:P1547 wd:Q650840 .
  ?game wdt:P128 ?series .
  ?game wdt:P663 wd:Q334634 ; wdt:P2550 ?runsD .
  ?game wdt:P663 wd:Q650840 ; wdt:P2550 ?runsP .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?difference)
LIMIT 1
